sous_titres.text: SUNDAY, JUNE 1, 2025 I HELPED MOM MAKE LUNCH TODAY
YOU HAVE MEMORY DISORDER FROM AN ACCIDENT CHECK YOUR COMPUTER ON THE DESK!
WHEN YOU WAKE UP, YOUR MEMORY RESETS TO BEFORE THE ACCIDENT
CHECK YOUR NOTES AND JOURNAL WHEN YOU WAKE UP IN THE MORNING
HAN SEO-YOON HAESOL HIGH SCHOOL JUNIOR, CLASS 5, NO. 29
ALWAYS KEEP THE NOTEBOOK IN YOUR BAG
CHECK TODAY'S TO-DOS ON THE CALENDAR!
CHECK YOUR JOURNAL ON THE COMPUTER! ALWAYS WRITE DOWN THINGS TO REMEMBER!
you got in a car accident that left you with a memory disorder.
your memory resets the next morning to the moment of the accident.
The only people who know about it
are your parents, Ji-min, and the teachers at school.
You've been keeping a journal every day since the accident.
- Did you do your homework? - We had homework?
- Why didn't you tell us before? - So, none of you did it?
Why draw attention? You think she'll be friends with you?
We're classmates, so we are friends.
- You're so embarrassing. - "So we are friends." What a joke.
I told you I liked her first.
Why not? Just go for it.
You punks! Are you trying to get killed?
- Are you okay? - Sir, watch your driving!
I told you that's not how you do it.
- You need to hold it like this. - What about you?
Why do you keep putting up with that?
- Jeez. - He had on his head some…
You made a mess on my desk.
Do you find that stuff funny?
Yeah, it makes me feel alive.
Stop bullying Dong-sik. Don't you feel bad for him?
What, are you his boyfriend? Do you think they're dating?
- Han Seo-yoon's getting asked out again. - It never ends, huh?
- She's so stuck-up. - She shot him down quick.
- She is pretty though. - Should I try next?
- I did it once, and she shot me down. - You idiot.
- You're such a lunatic. - Hey, you should ask Han Seo-yoon out.
You want me to do what?
- You want me to ask her out? - Yeah.
Why did I bother coming over? I'm off.
Hey, Dung-sik. You ask her out, then!
- Hey, get back here! - Since when were you there?
HEY, TURN AROUND AND LOOK UP AT THE CLASSROOM WINDOW
I'M SORRY FOR ALL THE TROUBLE
Make sure to review the characteristics I mentioned at the end,
and look over the materials for the next class if you can.
All right, that's it for today. Enjoy your lunch.
- There'll be a line! - Let's go!
- You haven't left for lunch. - What's up?
So, have you made up your mind?
Is that really all you want?
I'll just ask her and leave it at that.
- Hey, he's actually going to do it! - You're so cool, Jae-won!
Will you go out with me?
I think he's really doing it. Hurry!
- What did she say? - I don't believe it.
- Let's meet after school. - For real?
- Hey. Stay still. - What are you doing?
- to x squared plus three. - Jae-won.
It's shifted up by three units, and y equals x minus two squared.
- How does it shift? - How manly.
- He's so cool. - It shifts two units to the right.
"My boyfriend is a man of few words."
Did you call me your boyfriend?
What? You asked me out first.
Some kids are bullying my deskmate,
so I couldn't just sit back and watch.
They promised they'd stop bullying him
Well, I don't care what the reason is.
Do you not want to go out with me?
It's not that I don't want to, but…
I want to try something new.
But I have a few dating conditions.
we don't talk to each other until after school.
What are you doing, by the way?
so I should know you a little better.
Black bean noodles or spicy seafood noodle soup?
Do you like hard or soft peaches?
- Are you serious? - I'm going to do it.
Oh, I do have a favorite song.
You really don't have to do that.
You look like you'd be great at sports.
Are you a germaphobe or something?
Come on. I'm not a germaphobe.
- You care about… - I care about cleanliness.
By the way, why are you writing down all this?
You don't seem like the ordinary type.
I could say the same about you.
I guess I'm not exactly ordinary.
Keep that up, and you won't grow taller.
Like I need to. I'm taller than you now, Dad.
- What? - Have dinner. I made soybean paste stew.
Just leave it. I'll have it for breakfast tomorrow.
we don't talk to each other until after school.
I want you to stop dating Seo-yoon.
You've never even said hello to her before.
about what kind of person she is.
Wait. Is she getting his number?
Oh, we've got a love triangle.
- I don't think so. - It's mine. Give it back.
- Give it back. It's mine. - Why should I?
I think it's just the fabric softener.
Get out of the way. I can't see!
- You picked an easy one on purpose. - No, I didn't.
…HE WENT TO GET A DRINK, AND THAT WAS KIND OF CUTE
All I can offer you now is
I WANTED JAE-WON TO SING A FEW MORE SONGS, BUT HE WAS TOO SHY
- Hey, get that punk! - Come here, you bastard!
- You bastard. - Come at me, asshole.
- Forget him. Get him off him. - Damn it.
- You son of a bitch! - Come here!
- What's this? - Who the hell was that?
Is that asshole out of his mind?
Stop that, you piece of shit!
- I'm going to kill you too! - Teacher! Help!
- Forget it. You do it. - I'm sorry. Help me out.
You really got hit all over.
You should see the other guys.
- Now, turn the other way. - What?
Do this side a bit more.
Why did you guys fight anyway?
Why didn't you help me from the start?
Why wait until the last minute?
I thought you were good at fighting.
I don't think I'd be good at that either.
It's because you don't like to sweat, right?
Tell me if they bother you again. I've got the recording.
- What? - What are you looking at?
Do you miss her a lot?
You miss your mom a lot too, don't you?
I miss her even more than I did back then.
Back then, it was all just sad and hard,
and I didn't know what to do.
But now that it's been a while…
I don't know about anything else…
other than the fact that I miss her.
you won't have such a hard time anymore.
I want you to start taking photos again,
and go out and have fun once in a while.
I think it's nice that I get to think about her.
I want you to spend more time having fun
You're nagging more and more now.
I'll eat it if you won't.
Why do you keep following me around?
I'm letting you hang out with me. You have no friends.
By the way, are you really dating Seo-yoon?
Why do you act like total strangers?
We just decided to do that at school.
Here we go again. Why do you always bring up dumb stuff?
- It's your first time dating a girl, huh? - Can we not talk about this?
- What's wrong with you? - Listen, kiddo.
If you don't do what the girl says, you're in trouble.
But if you only do what she says,
How will you kiss or make out with her at this rate?
- What are they doing? - Fine, I'll stop.
THE FINALS ARE IN TWO WEEKS, YOU KNOW…
I'M JUST CLEARING MY HEAD FOR A MINUTE!!
WE'VE BEEN HERE FOR TEN MINUTES
WHAT DOES THAT HAVE TO DO WITH…
Do you want to go on a date this weekend?
I've only ever seen you in your uniform,
I found a really nice spot earlier.
Do you want to check it out?
It's not that big of a deal.
I'm just used to doing the housework myself,
so I got good at doing stuff like this.
Oh, did your mom teach you?
It's just me and my dad.
For some reason, I feel like I can tell you anything.
Of course, I made it for you. Hang on.
- Is it good? - Yeah! It's so good!
We haven't known each other long,
we've slowly been building up all this time together.
We had our date today, remember?
What do you mean you don't remember?
I guess the date wasn't as good as you thought, huh?
and I was on a bus.
NOTES ON MY BOYFRIEND KIM JAE-WON
FRIDAY, MAY 23, 2025 ORGANIZED NOTES & JOURNAL, NOTHING UNUSUAL
SATURDAY, MAY 24, 2025: GOT TO SCHOOL LATE SUNDAY, MAY 25, 2025: STAYED HOME ALL DAY
MONDAY, MAY 26, 2025: HAD A BAD HEADACHE TUESDAY, MAY 27, 2025: HOSPITAL CHECKUP
FRIDAY, MAY 30, 2025: NOTHING UNUSUAL SATURDAY, MAY 31, 2025: WILL I GET BETTER?
MONDAY, JUNE 2, 2025 A TALL BOY WHO LOOKED HIGH-STRUNG…
A tall boy who looked high-strung
walked up to me out of nowhere.
- "Will you go out with me?" - Will you go out with me?
I agreed to go out with him.
Maybe I'll get to try something new.
It'd be a problem if he brought up things from the day before.
is that we don't talk to each other until after school.
I need time to sort out all the information about me and him.
is that we don't catch real feelings.
We'll have to break up soon anyway.
So, there's no point in having deep feelings.
I seem to have memory issues.
you don't have to tell me now.
I used you for selfish reasons.
maybe I could try something new even though I'm like this.
if you don't write down what happened today,
you won't know about it tomorrow, right?
don't write that you told me you have a memory disorder.
I have fun hanging out with you.
I don't want things to change between us.
Of course, only if you're okay with it.
ANTEROGRADE AMNESIA IS WHEN YOU CAN'T FORM NEW MEMORIES DUE TO HIPPOCAMPUS DAMAGE
See? I can read you right now.
So, what did you want to tell me?
I wanted to thank you for calling me yesterday.
You don't have to thank me.
I only do what I want to do and what I can do.
It's really dangerous if people spread rumors
that she has a memory disorder…
because whatever happens, Seo-yoon won't remember anything.
Not everyone in this world is good.
want to make sure every new day is a good day for her.
to be filled with happy memories.
Oh, and I asked her not to write about what happened yesterday.
- What? - I didn't want her to feel bad
or avoid me because of it.
I figured I should tell you.
I think I can trust you now.
Just don't be irresponsible and bail on her later.
I'll leave the rest to you.
Oh, right. I have a girlfriend.
Look at you, all grown up.
I need to give you some allowance.
Forget it. You don't have any money.
Things are going great at the studio these days.
I think I asked to see Seo-yoon alone. How did this happen?
We're done with exams, so what should we do?
What can we do that's so fun it will make others jealous?
Do you have to be involved?
Come on, why would you say that?
Is there anything you wanted to do or any place you wanted to go?
We haven't hung out as a group in a while, and exams are over…
Don't touch her. Why would you touch her?
- No, not me. - What's wrong with you?
There's a place I want to go.
I want to go see penguins.
- Hey, it's dangerous! Look ahead! - Jeez, you scared me.
- They're super cute. - They're really cute.
Why did you want to see penguins?
Because it's so cute how they toddle.
I hope we get to see them.
- Penguins… - Oh, this must be it.
THE PENGUINS ARE RESTING TODAY SEE YOU NEXT TIME

Maybe they'll come out if we wait.
Should we check out that side?
I thought you might like it.
I had so much fun today.
Seriously, don't do it. I'll splash you back.
How do you tie your shoelaces like that?
You need to do it this way,
It's not that I don't like it, but it was just so cheesy.
I want to go home now.

Here are the most handsome and cutest penguins in the world!
I told you girls love surprises, didn't I?
- She's just laughing at me. - No, she's not!
- I told you I didn't want to do it! - Oh, shut it. She looks happy.
Wait, Mr. Penguin! Let me take a picture first.
- Take a picture of me too, Ji-min. - Don't be shy. You look adorable.
Is this why you've been bothering me the past few days?
What do you think? Not bad, right?
- Come on. Stop it. - Come here. Please, just once.
- She seems happy. - No, forget it.
- Come on. - Take a picture of me.
IF ONLY I COULD REMEMBER THIS DAY…
I listen to you pretty well, don't I?

is your dad Kim Sang-hyeon, the photographer?

but she's too nervous to say anything.

Stop drinking beer. You'll put on weight.

Still, don't stay out too late.

Ji-min said she was a huge fan of yours.
You saw how she was, right?

Let me fry you an egg or something.

You little brat, you think you're better than me.
Seo-yoon's parents called me this morning.
seems to be afraid of falling asleep these days.
trying really hard to make her happy every day.

the more it must hurt to forget them.

your body remembers, not your mind.

you don't forget how to ride a bike.
